title: Crispy Dutch-Style Toor Dal Fritters
description: A flavorful and crispy snack made with toor dal, inspired by Dutch culinary techniques. Perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine toor dal, Dutch-Style flour, cilantro, crispy onions, salt, and baking powder.
3. Gradually add water to form a thick batter.
4. Heat oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
6. Fry for 4-5 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
